nasb.text: to occupy this ministry and apostleship from which Judas turned aside to go to his own place.”

esv.text: to take the place in this ministry and apostleship from which Judas turned aside to go to his own place.”

cnv.text: 來承擔這使徒的職位和工作。這職位猶大已經放棄，往他自己的地方去了。”

csbs.text: 使他得到这服事和使徒的职份。犹大背弃了这职份，去了自己的地方。”
